calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-16-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:01am
Judge Pro Tem John Gulick, Jr., clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Herbert Yanowitz, attorney appears for Engineer Kung-Yuen and associates. Mizee Szeto, respondent appears in Pro Per. Mr. Yanowitze informs the court that the parties have reached a settlement and would like to dismiss the case. The Court dismisses the appeal based on the representation of both sides that the matter was settled.
